title: 20 Reasons to Prefer Üsküdar University
content:
20 Reasons to Prefer Üsküdar University

Because we are Türkiye's first behavioral and health sciences themed university!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University to experience the privilege of studying at Türkiye's first behavioral and health sciences themed university.

Because we are in the center of the city!

We are waiting for you to Üsküdar University for a comfortable education in its campuses in the most central points of Istanbul and to explore the city easily...

Because we have everything you are looking for in technology and health!

We are waiting for you to Üsküdar University for an education that emphasizes techno-entrepreneurship by combining technology with health...

Because your path is always open with the University-Hospital cooperation!

We are waiting for you at Üsküdar University to have strong employment opportunities with the scientific partnership of NP Istanbul Brain Hospital...

Because we are the first practitioner of "Positive Psychology"!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University to meet the first practitioner of "Positive Psychology" in Türkiye...

Because Erasmus+ and more are waiting for you!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University to benefit from student exchange programs and collaborations with reputable universities in many countries...

Because everything you are looking for about "Brain Initiative" is here!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University to study at the only university that made a presentation on Brain Initiative studies at the 2015 G20 Summit...

Because everything you are looking for about "Perfect Medicine" is here!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University to take part in "Flawless Medicine" studies that take into account individual differences in order to achieve better results in treatments...

Because we are the University with full marks in "Neuropsychopharmacology"!

We are the biggest representative of "Neuropsychopharmacology" in Türkiye and we welcome you to Üsküdar University as a university that has received full marks from world-renowned scientists!

Because everything about Prof. Nevzat TARHAN's vision is here!

We are waiting for you to become a member of Üsküdar University, where Prof. Nevzat Tarhan, one of Türkiye's leading psychiatry experts with over 100 publications, 31 of which are international, is the President...

Because we have a strong academic staff!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University to receive education from a unique academic staff including a scientist with a schizophrenia drug patent, a member of the UN Drug Control Board, a member of the UN Environment Board, and faculty members who have a say in many different fields...

Because we care about R&D!

In addition to the privilege of education in more than 40 laboratories, including Türkiye's first personalized treatment and advanced toxicology laboratories, we welcome you to Üsküdar University to explore R&D focuses such as Neuromodulation Therapies, Neurogenetic Studies, Autism, Schizophrenia, Alzheimer's Research and Virtual Reality in Health Programs...

Because whatever you want in a research center, we have it!

We are waiting for you at Üsküdar University to equip you with a wide range of application and research centers for different fields from new horizons in engineering to genetics to virtual reality...

Because we train qualified people in the field of Sufi Studies!

With Türkiye's first Sufi Studies Institute, we welcome you to Üsküdar University to take part under the same roof with a science center that focuses on human values and raising qualified people...

Because we have all the opportunities for the professions of the future!

We welcome you to Üsküdar University for Türkiye's first Forensic Sciences Undergraduate Program as well as departments and programs for the professions of the future where you can receive multidisciplinary education.

Because we have everything you are looking for in "Project Culture and Entrepreneurship"!

We are waiting for you to turn your commercial ideas into reality with Brain Park Incubation Center and to participate in university culture courses...

Because we produce valuable works in scientific publishing!

We are waiting for you to Üsküdar University to experience the privilege of a publishing house where many valuable works meet the reader, as well as scientific and actual journals, including 4 refereed journals such as JNBS, Social Sciences, PsychoLife, Addiction, Interaction...

Because everything you are looking for in a student club is here!

We are waiting for you to contribute to your personal development by socializing with more than 70 student clubs at Üsküdar University...

Because we know no boundaries in scientific and cultural activities!

From Türkiye's first Science and Ideas Festival to the High Human Values Awards, we welcome you to Üsküdar University to expand your horizons with many different events...

Because we support success with scholarship opportunities!

If you want your success to be encouraged in the best way possible with a wide range of scholarship opportunities at different rates, we are waiting for you at Üsküdar University...
